title: avena disticha
intro: Avena disticha, also known as oat grass or oat straw, is a type of grass belonging to the oat family (Poaceae) and is a lesser-known relative of common oats. The medicinal properties of Avena disticha lie in its high content of saponins, which have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Avena disticha include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote a restful sleep. Avena disticha can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, which can be consumed on its own or blended with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
